Prototype using the current RDAR demo dataset — not connected to live systems.
RDAR Research Impact Explorer
Home Projects Institutions Programs Research Topics By Year ⚙ Internal Review
Prototype demo using full available demo data. Not connected to live RDAR, ARGO, GovAlta, PostgreSQL, CRA, Federal, or Alberta public datasets.
Entity resolution and Smart Search use the Method 1 fuzzy-matching engine (tina_fuzzy_matching.py) ported to this prototype. Research topics are inferred for demo navigation. Funding information is not included in the current source dataset.
Last updated: July 2026 demo build.
